01003.name: "Skids" O'Toole
01003.text:
[fast] During your turn, spend 2 resources: You may take an additional action this turn. (Limit once per turn.)
[elder_sign] effect: +2. If you succeed, gain 2 resources.

01010.name: On the Lam
01010.text:
"Skids" O'Toole deck only.
Fast. Play after your turn begins.
Until the end of the round, non-[[Elite]] enemies cannot attack you.

01011.name: Hospital Debts
01011.text: Revelation - Put Hospital Debts into play in your threat area. [fast]: Move 1 resource from your resource pool to Hospital Debts. (Limit twice per round.) Forced - When the game ends, if Hospital Debts has fewer than 6 resources on it: You earn 2 fewer experience for this scenario.

01016.name: .45 Automatic
01016.text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01020.name: Machete
01020.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is the only enemy engaged with you, this attack deals +1 damage.

01025.name: Vicious Blow
01025.text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, that attack deals +1 damage.

01047.name: .41 Derringer
01047.text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

01050.name: Elusive
01050.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you and move to a revealed location with no enemies.

01052.name: Sneak Attack
01052.text: Deal 2 damage to an exhausted enemy at your location.

01053.name: Opportunist
01053.text:
Commit only to a skill test you are performing.
If you succeed by 3 or more, return Opportunist to your hand after this test instead of discarding it.

01089.name: Guts
01089.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01091.name: Overpower
01091.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01101.name: Mob Enforcer
01101.text: Prey - Bearer only. Hunter. [action] Spend 4 resources: Parley. Discard Mob Enforcer.

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01145.name: Vengeance Awaits
01145.text: Forced - When this agenda advances: - If the investigators are at Act 1, put the set-aside Ritual Site into play and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there. - If the investigators are at Act 2 or 3, discard all enemies at the Ritual Site and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01151.name: Arkham Woods
01151.text: Forced - When you move out of this location: Test [intellect] (3). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move.

01153.name: Arkham Woods
01153.text: This location is investigated using [agility] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01155.name: Arkham Woods
01155.text: [action]: Heal 1 damage or heal 1 horror. (Limit once per turn.)

01156.name: Ritual Site
01156.text: Forced - At the end of the round, if there are fewer than 2 clues per investigator on Ritual Site: Add clues to it until it has 2 clues per investigator on it.

01157.name: Umôrdhoth
01157.text: Hunter. Massive. Umôrdhoth gets +4 health per investigator. Forced - At the end of each investigator's turn: Ready Umôrdhoth. [action] If you control Lita Chantler: "It's only after her!" You throw Lita to Umôrdhoth in order to spare your lives. (→R3)

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01164.name: Frozen in Fear
01164.text: Revelation - Put Frozen in Fear into play in your threat area. The first time you perform one of the following actions (move, fight, or evade) each round, it costs 1 additional action. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Frozen in Fear.

01165.name: Dissonant Voices
01165.text: Revelation - Put Dissonant Voices into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or events. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Dissonant Voices.

01176.name: The Yellow Sign
01176.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, take 2 horror and search your deck for a [[Madness]] weakness. Draw that card and shuffle your deck.

50036.name: Arkham Woods
50036.text: Forced - After you reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag during an evasion attempt at this location: Reveal and resolve an additional chaos token. (Limit once per test.)

50039.name: Acolyte of Umôrdhoth
50039.text:
Prey - Fewest cards in hand.
While engaged with an investigator with no cards in his or her hand, Acolyte of Umôrdhoth cannot be evaded.

50041.name: Disciple of the Devourer
50041.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - After you spawn Disciple of the Devourer: You must either place 1 doom on it or place 1 of your clues on its location. If the current agenda is not agenda 1, do both instead.

50042.name: Corpse-Taker
50042.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Place 1 doom on Corpse-Taker.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Corpse-Taker moves once toward Rivertown or Main Path. If Corpse-Taker is already at Rivertown or Main Path, move all doom from Corpse-Taker to the current agenda, instead.

50043.name: Mask of Umôrdhoth
50043.text:
Revelation - Attach to the farthest [[Cultist]] enemy and place 1 doom on that enemy. If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Cultist]] enemy, draw it, and attach Mask of Umôrdhoth to it. Shuffle the encounter deck.
Attached enemy gets +2 health. If attached enemy is unique, it gains retaliate. If it is non-unique, it gains aloof instead.
